texto: The technology is just so far gone. It's just like back in the day you needed a suitcase just to have a cell phone. The battery was so heavy, it was like carrying a gallon of soda around with you all day.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jam Master Jay: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “The technology is just so far gone. It's just like back in the day you needed a suitcase just to …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, day, cell-phone pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de cell-phone e you.
